meanings.definition: kindheartedness through maturity or old age
a taste (especially of fruit) that is ripe and of full flavor
the property of a sensation that is rich and pleasing
examples: the music had a fullness that echoed through the hall
the cheap wine had no body, no mellowness
he was well aware of the richness of his own appearance

meanings.definition: a soft shade of a color
examples: a mellowness of light and shade not attainable in marble

meanings.definition: geniality, as through the effects of alcohol or marijuana
